seed_problem: Frontier-CS polyomino/area packing: pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area (reflections allowed); checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
mutation: output: from free polyomino tiling, add hard output constraints -- per-type limited stock (bounded knapsack) plus bedrock obstacles -- so perfect tiling is impossible and the optimal packing is NP-hard; objective stays max-covered-area.
title: Vineyard Irrigation: Sprinkler-Panel Coverage
strategies: single-type baseline: anchored greedy using only panel type 0 up to its small stock (the calibration point)
largest-first greedy: at each uncovered cell install the largest-area panel that fits, mixing all types, stock-limited
seeded multi-restart randomized greedy: shuffle type priority and orientation enumeration across many restarts, keep the best-covering packing
local-search / repair: greedily fill, then re-pack sparse regions with smaller panels to plug leftover gaps
